zh: 足智多謀的，有解決問題能力的
en: She is very resourceful and can solve problems quickly.
en_example: She is very resourceful and can solve problems quickly.
zh_example: She is very resourceful and can solve problems quickly.
ja: 機転が利く、資源をうまく活用できる
ja_example: She is very resourceful and can solve problems quickly.
kana: きてんがきく、しげんをうまくかつようできる
romaji: kiten ga kiku, shigen o umaku katsuyou dekiru

en: Einstein was a genius in physics.
en_example: Einstein was a genius in physics.
zh_example: Einstein was a genius in physics.
ja: 天才、非常に優れた才能を持つ人
ja_example: Einstein was a genius in physics.
kana: てんさい、ひじょうにすぐれたさいのうをもつひと
romaji: tensai, hijō ni sugureta sainō o motsu hito

en: The internet connection is very fast today.
en_example: The internet connection is very fast today.
zh_example: The internet connection is very fast today.
ja_example: The internet connection is very fast today.

en: We can stream videos online anytime.
en_example: We can stream videos online anytime.
zh_example: We can stream videos online anytime.
ja: ストリーミング、連続してデータを送ること
ja_example: We can stream videos online anytime.
kana: ストリーミング、れんぞくしてデータをおくること
romaji: sutorīmingu, renzoku shite dēta o okuru koto

en: The phone call was breaking up due to poor signal.
en_example: The phone call was breaking up due to poor signal.
zh_example: The phone call was breaking up due to poor signal.
ja: 通信が途切れる、音声が途切れ途切れになる
ja_example: The phone call was breaking up due to poor signal.
kana: つうしんがとぎれる、おんせいがとぎれとぎれになる
romaji: tsūshin ga togireru, onsei ga togire togire ni naru

en: She used her communication pad to talk to her friends.
en_example: She used her communication pad to talk to her friends.
zh_example: She used her communication pad to talk to her friends.
ja_example: She used her communication pad to talk to her friends.
kana: つうしんパッド、つうしんきき

en: They worked together to free the trapped animal.
en_example: They worked together to free the trapped animal.
zh_example: They worked together to free the trapped animal.
ja_example: They worked together to free the trapped animal.
kana: かいほうする、じゆうにする

en: He swung the bat and hit the ball.
en_example: He swung the bat and hit the ball.
zh_example: He swung the bat and hit the ball.
ja: バット（野球のバット）、コウモリ
ja_example: He swung the bat and hit the ball.
kana: バット（やきゅうのバット）、コウモリ

en: Be careful when crossing the street.
en_example: Be careful when crossing the street.
zh_example: Be careful when crossing the street.
ja_example: Be careful when crossing the street.
kana: ちゅういぶかい、しんちょうな
